## Proposal Metadata

- Type: `Standard | Operational | Informational | Process`
- Scope: `National | Regional | Experimental | Recommendation`
- Related Issue: `#`

## Summary

Briefly explain the proposal and intended decision.

## Impact

Who is affected and how.

## Rollout / Migration

Steps for introduction, transition, and rollback if needed.

## Open Questions

List unresolved concerns that need feedback.

## Checklist

- [ ] Proposal file follows naming rules.
- [ ] Required metadata fields are present.
- [ ] `Discussion` field links to the idea issue.
- [ ] Alternatives are described.
- [ ] `WIP` label is present while Draft; removed only when maintainers start the decision window.
- [ ] Votes use reactions on this PR description (not on review comments).
- [ ] Decision section is ready for final maintainer summary.
